register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Sign up for free, start today
register.tncText: I have read and agree to the
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
register.tncContent:
TAPPYPOS TERMS OF USE

1. By registering, you agree to use this application solely for legitimate shop management purposes.

2. We collect shop data to provide our services. Your data is secured and will not be shared with third parties without your consent.

3. You are responsible for keeping your account and PIN secure.

4. TappyPOS reserves the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.

5. Support contact: support@tappypos.vn or 0901 234 567.

templates.title: Appointment reminder templates

oa.title: Connect Zalo OA
oa.subtitle: Link your Zalo Official Account to send messages with your own sender identity
oa.statusNotConnectedHint: Messages are sent via the TappyPOS platform OA
oa.modeAppSecretHint: Recommended — TappyPOS renews the access token automatically before it expires.
oa.modeTokenHint: Paste an access token you've already generated. You will need to update it manually before it expires.
oa.accessTokenPlaceholder: Paste your Zalo access token here
oa.helpText: Go to developers.zalo.me → your OA app → copy the App ID and App Secret. TappyPOS will automatically manage the access token on your behalf. The token is renewed automatically before it expires.
oa.disconnectMsg: Appointment reminders will be sent via the TappyPOS platform account instead.
oa.connectedInfo: ZNS reminders are now sent from your own Zalo Official Account. The token is renewed automatically — no manual renewal needed.
oa.connectedTokenInfo: ZNS reminders are sent from your Zalo Official Account. This connection uses a manually-provided access token — remember to update it before it expires.

welcome.title:
Welcome to
TappyPOS 🎉
welcome.subtitle: Complete 4 steps to set up your shop and get a personalised experience.

step1.title: Basic Information
step1.subtitle: 🏪 Help us personalise the experience for you and your customers.
step1.hint1: Your nickname is how TappyPOS greets you every day
step1.hint2: Shop name appears on every receipt and report

pawnFeature.title: Does your shop accept pawn?

pawnInterest.hint3: All settings can be updated later in Settings → Pawn

BIWEEKLY.label: Bi-weekly (15 days)

pawnInterest.dueDateHint: Days from the pawn date to the due date (e.g. 30)

step3.title: Monthly Expenses

step4.title: Review

step4.hint3: Everything can still be updated after your shop is created
step4.networkError: Cannot connect. Check your network and try again.

shopType.title: Shop Type
shopType.subtitle: 🎯 Choose the type that best fits your business so TappyPOS can suggest the right products and settings.

CONVENIENCE_STORE.name: Convenience Store
CONVENIENCE_STORE.examples: Mini-mart, grocery, daily goods, general retail
CONVENIENCE_STORE.hint: Great for grocery stores, mini-marts, and general retail. TappyPOS suggests food, beverage, and everyday consumer product categories.

FOOD_BEVERAGE.name: Food & Beverage
FOOD_BEVERAGE.examples: Fresh food, packaged drinks, fruit stall, snacks
FOOD_BEVERAGE.hint: For fresh and packaged food and drink shops. Includes expiry date tracking and effective inventory management.

RESTAURANT.name: Restaurant
RESTAURANT.examples: Pho shop, rice shop, noodle house, local eatery
RESTAURANT.hint: Ideal for eateries and restaurants. Supports order-taking with table notes, shift-based revenue tracking and daily reporting.

COFFEE_SHOP.name: Coffee Shop
COFFEE_SHOP.examples: Café, bubble tea, juice bar, smoothie shop
COFFEE_SHOP.hint: For cafes, bubble tea, and juice shops. Fast checkout, flexible menus, and loyalty point tracking for regulars.

FASHION.name: Fashion
FASHION.examples: Clothing, shoes, accessories, bags, fashion retail
FASHION.hint: For clothing, accessories, and footwear shops. Manage sizes, colours, and inventory per product variant.

ELECTRONICS.name: Electronics
ELECTRONICS.examples: Phone shop, laptop, electronics, home appliances
ELECTRONICS.hint: For electronics and appliance stores. Tracks warranties, serial numbers, and lets staff search by specification.

BARBER_SHOP.name: Salon / Barbershop
BARBER_SHOP.examples: Men's barber, hair salon, perm, hair colouring, wash
BARBER_SHOP.hint: For hair salons and barbershops. Stores each customer's style preferences and visit history for personalised service.

NAIL_SHOP.name: Nail Studio
NAIL_SHOP.examples: Nail polish, gel, acrylic, nail art, manicure, pedicure
NAIL_SHOP.hint: For nail studios and manicure shops. Tracks each customer's preferred nail style and service history.

SPA_SHOP.name: Spa / Beauty Center
SPA_SHOP.examples: Massage, facial, waxing, hair removal, body treatment
SPA_SHOP.hint: For spas and beauty centers. Manages treatment courses, skin type records, and customer therapy history.

PHARMACY.name: Pharmacy
PHARMACY.hint: For pharmacies and small clinics. Manages drugs by registration number, expiry date, and prescription requirements.

JEWELRY.name: Jewelry / Gold
JEWELRY.hint: For gold and jewellery shops. Auto-prices items based on live market gold rates with weight and material tracking.

PAWN_SHOP.name: Pawn Shop
PAWN_SHOP.examples: Pawn shop, collateral lending, asset loans
PAWN_SHOP.hint: For pawn and collateral lending businesses. Creates pawn contracts, calculates interest automatically, and alerts on due dates.

OTHER.name: Other
OTHER.examples: Service business, any type not listed above
OTHER.hint: Your business type isn't listed here. You can still configure products, categories, and expenses after your shop is created.

PHO_SHOP.name: Pho Shop
PHO_SHOP.examples: Beef pho, chicken pho, pho restaurant

RICE_SHOP.name: Rice Shop
RICE_SHOP.examples: Rice plates, com tam, daily rice meals

NOODLE_SHOP.name: Noodle Shop
NOODLE_SHOP.examples: Noodle soup, stir-fried noodles, hu tieu, bun rieu

BUN_BO.name: Bun Bo Shop
BUN_BO.examples: Bun bo Hue, spicy beef noodle soup

HOT_POT.name: Hot Pot Restaurant
HOT_POT.examples: Thai hot pot, seafood hot pot, mushroom hot pot

LAU_BO.name: Lẩu bò
LAU_BO.examples: Beef hot pot, beef dipped in vinegar, grilled beef

QUAN_DE.name: Quán Dê
QUAN_DE.examples: Stir-fried goat, grilled goat, herbal goat stew

BANH_MI.name: Banh Mi Shop
BANH_MI.examples: Banh mi, Vietnamese sandwich, pate, cold cuts

EATERY.name: Street Food / Snacks
EATERY.examples: Street food, xoi, banh cuon, nem, spring rolls

CAFE.name: Coffee Shop
CAFE.examples: Drip coffee, milk coffee, iced coffee

BUBBLE_TEA.name: Bubble Tea Shop
BUBBLE_TEA.examples: Bubble tea, milk tea, fruit tea, topping

NAIL_STUDIO.name: Nail Studio
NAIL_STUDIO.examples: Manicure, pedicure, nail art, acrylic, gel

LASH_PMU.name: Lash & PMU Studio
LASH_PMU.examples: Eyelash extensions, eyebrow tattoo, lip tattoo, eyeliner

MASSAGE.name: Massage Shop
MASSAGE.examples: Relaxation massage, therapeutic massage, foot massage

BEAUTY_CLINIC.name: Beauty Clinic
BEAUTY_CLINIC.examples: Facial, acne treatment, laser, HIFU, hair removal

MAKEUP_STUDIO.name: Makeup & Bridal Studio
MAKEUP_STUDIO.examples: Event makeup, bridal makeup, photo shoot makeup

TRAD_MEDICINE.name: Traditional Medicine
TRAD_MEDICINE.examples: Herbal medicine, Chinese medicine, medicinal herbs

PAWN.name: Pawn Shop
PAWN.examples: Pawn, collateral loans, buy & sell used goods

CAR_WASH.name: Car Wash
CAR_WASH.examples: Motorbike wash, car wash, auto detailing

LAUNDRY.name: Laundry Service
LAUNDRY.examples: Wash & dry, dry cleaning, laundry drop-off

FLOWER_SHOP.name: Flower Shop
FLOWER_SHOP.examples: Fresh flowers, artificial flowers, event flowers

OTHER.name: Other
OTHER.examples: Other business type not listed above

PUB.name: Pub / Beer House
PUB.hint: For pubs and beer houses serving drinks and bar snacks. Supports table management and order tracking.

PUB_SEAFOOD.name: Seafood Pub
PUB_SEAFOOD.examples: Fresh seafood, seafood hotpot, live shrimp & crab
PUB_SEAFOOD.hint: For seafood-focused pubs. Supports table management, rich seafood menu, and advance reservations.

PUB_GOAT.name: Goat Meat Pub
PUB_GOAT.examples: Stir-fried goat, grilled goat, goat hotpot

PUB_BEEF.examples: Beef shabu, grilled beef, beef hotpot
PUB_BEEF.hint: For pubs specialising in beef dishes. Supports table management and flexible pricing.

staff.title: Staff
staff.detailHint: View contact info, work details and performance.
staff.formHint:
✏️ Enter the name and phone number to create an account — a temporary password is generated automatically.
Tap Save and note the login details before sharing them with the staff member.
staff.editHint:
✏️ Update the staff member's name or change their role.
Use Reset Password if the staff member has forgotten their password.
staff.cannotEditSelf: 🔒 You cannot edit your own profile here.
staff.tempPasswordHint: Note this password before saving — staff will need to change it on first login.
staff.credentialHint: Note down the credentials and share with the staff member. The password will not be shown again.
staff.resetPasswordMsg: A new temporary password will be generated. Staff must change it on next login.
staff.deactivateConfirmMsg: This staff member will not be able to log in. You can reactivate later.
staff.activateConfirmMsg: This staff member will be able to log in again.
staff.noStaffHint: Add staff so they can log in and use the app.
staff.errorUsernameRequired: Please enter a phone number or username
staff.featureCustomHintOn: This staff member uses a custom feature set instead of the role defaults.
staff.featureCustomHintOff: Using default features for the selected role.
staff.featureMatrixInfo: Check the features this staff member can access. Features with 🔒 are auto-enabled because another selected feature depends on them.
staff.notesPlaceholder: Additional notes about this staff member

No sales data yet.

pawn.title: Pawn
pawn.formHint:
💼 Fill in the customer, item description, and loan terms.
The pawn contract will be created with the terms you set.
pawn.detailHint:
💼 Review the pawn contract details and available actions.
Collect interest, process redemption, or forfeit the contract here.
pawn.emptyHint: Tap + to create your first pawn contract
pawn.exportError: Could not export the list. Please try again.

summary.overdueHint: Contact customers immediately to recover assets
summary.upcomingHint: Remind customers to redeem or extend

extend.title: Extend Contract

settings.title: Pawn Settings
settings.defaultRateHint: Auto-applied to every new contract. Adjustable per contract.
settings.defaultDueDateHint: Due date = pawn date + this many days
settings.calcModeHint: Applies to all new contracts by default.
settings.calcMode_DAILY_30_desc: Charge every actual day; 1 month = 30 days. Most common.
settings.calcMode_DAILY_25_desc: Same daily rate but capped at 25 chargeable days per 30-day period. More favourable for customers.
settings.calcMode_MONTHLY_desc: Round up to the next complete month. e.g. 31 days → 2 months.
settings.calcMode_BIWEEKLY_desc: Round up to the next half-month. e.g. 16 days → 2 half-months.
settings.acceptedTypesHint: Only selected types will appear when creating a new contract.

upgrade.title: Upgrade plan
upgrade.limitReached: You've reached your monthly order limit. Choose a plan to continue.

You will not be able to log back into this shop
deleteShop.irreversibleNotice: After deletion, you will need to create a new shop to continue using TappyPOS.

deleteShop.successHint: All staff have been logged out. You will be automatically signed out.
deleteShop.errorFailed: Failed to delete shop. Please try again.

tnc.intro: By using TappyPOS you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to all of the Terms & Conditions below.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.i1: By accessing or using TappyPOS you agree to be bound by these Terms and all related policies published in the app.
s1.i2: If you use TappyPOS on behalf of an organisation or business, you confirm that you have the authority to bind that organisation to these Terms.
s1.i3: If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, please stop using the app immediately.

s2.title: 2. Service Description
s2.i1: TappyPOS is a cloud-based point-of-sale (POS) platform for small and medium-sized shops in Vietnam, covering product management, orders, customers, staff, expenses, reports, and e-invoicing.
s2.i2: The service is provided "as-is" and may be updated, changed, or partly discontinued without prior notice, except for changes that directly affect your rights.
s2.i3: We reserve the right to limit access to certain features based on your subscription plan.

s3.title: 3. Account Registration
s3.i1: You must provide accurate, complete, and up-to-date information when registering. Accounts are tied to a valid Vietnamese phone number.
s3.i2: Each phone number may only be linked to one account. Creating multiple accounts to circumvent rules is a violation of these Terms.
s3.i3: You are responsible for keeping your password, PIN, and credentials secure. All activity under your account is your responsibility.
s3.i4: Notify us immediately at support@tappypos.vn if you discover unauthorised access to your account.

s4.title: 4. Subscription & Payment
s4.i1: TappyPOS offers a free trial and paid monthly or annual plans. Plan details and pricing are shown in the app and may change over time.
s4.i2: Fees are non-refundable once paid, except where a technical fault on our side is confirmed.
s4.i3: Late payment may lead to account restrictions or suspension. Your data is retained for at least 30 days after suspension.

s5.title: 5. Data Ownership
s5.i1: All data you enter into TappyPOS (products, orders, customers, etc.) belongs to you. We claim no ownership over your business data.
s5.i2: You can export your data at any time using the report-export function in the app.
s5.i3: After account deletion your data will be fully purged within 30 days, except for data that applicable law requires us to retain.
s5.i4: We use anonymised, aggregated data to improve our service and never sell your personal data to third parties.

s6.title: 6. Privacy & Data Security
s6.i1: We apply industry-standard security measures including SSL/TLS encryption for all data in transit and AES-256 encryption for sensitive fields (e.g. e-invoice credentials).
s6.i2: Data is stored on cloud infrastructure in Singapore with daily backups. We cannot guarantee absolute security but commit to notifying you within 72 hours of any breach that affects your data.
s6.i3: TappyPOS will never ask you to provide your password over the phone, by email, or by message.

s7.title: 7. User Responsibilities
s7.i1: You agree to use TappyPOS only for lawful business management purposes and to comply with all applicable Vietnamese law, including e-invoice, tax, and consumer-protection regulations.
s7.i2: You are responsible for the accuracy of all data you enter, including product prices, customer information, and financial transactions.
s7.i3: You must not grant third parties access to your account except through the staff-permission system built into the app.
s7.i4: You are responsible for ensuring the device running TappyPOS is protected by a screen lock and not accessible to unauthorised persons.

s8.title: 8. Prohibited Conduct
s8.i1: Strictly prohibited: using the app for any unlawful business activity, tax fraud, money laundering, or any other illegal purpose.
s8.i2: Strictly prohibited: attempting unauthorised access, reverse-engineering, copying source code, or attacking TappyPOS systems.
s8.i3: Strictly prohibited: sharing, selling, or transferring your account to any third party.
s8.i4: Violating any of the above may result in immediate account termination and may expose you to legal liability.

s9.title: 9. Intellectual Property
s9.i1: All intellectual property rights in TappyPOS — including the interface, features, icons, trademarks, and documentation — are owned by us or our licensors.
s9.i2: You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence to use the app in accordance with these Terms.
s9.i3: Feedback, suggestions, and feature requests you submit may be used to improve the service without any obligation to compensate you.
s9.i4: You may not use the TappyPOS name, logo, or brand for any purpose without our written consent.

s10.title: 10. Service Availability
s10.i1: We target a minimum monthly uptime of 99%. Scheduled maintenance will be announced at least 24 hours in advance where possible. TappyPOS supports offline mode for basic sales operations when connectivity is lost.
s10.i2: We are not liable for service interruptions caused by cloud infrastructure providers, telecoms networks, or events beyond our reasonable control.

s11.title: 11. Limitation of Liability
s11.i1: To the maximum extent permitted by law, TappyPOS is not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of or inability to use the service.
s11.i2: Our total liability for any claim will not exceed the amount you paid for the service in the preceding 3 months.
s11.i3: TappyPOS is not responsible for business decisions you make based on data in the app. Reports and statistics are for reference only.

s12.title: 12. Termination
s12.i1: You may terminate your account at any time using the "Delete account" feature in the app. Deletion is irreversible.
s12.i2: We may suspend or terminate your account if we detect a breach of these Terms, with prior notice where possible (except in cases of serious breach requiring immediate action).
s12.i3: After termination you will lose access to data stored on the system. Please export your data before deleting your account.

s13.title: 13. Dispute Resolution
s13.i1: These Terms are governed by the laws of Vietnam. Any dispute arising from or relating to these Terms will first be resolved by good-faith negotiation.
s13.i2: If negotiation fails within 30 days, the dispute will be submitted to the competent People's Court in Vietnam.

s14.title: 14. Amendments & Contact
s14.i1: We may update these Terms from time to time. In-app notice will be given at least 7 days before changes take effect for existing users.
s14.i2: Continued use of the service after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
s14.i3: Contact us: Email: support@tappypos.vn — Hotline: 0901 234 567 — Support hours: 8:00–22:00 (Mon–Sun)
